deathforensics.hint: Run /howdididie to see exactly what just killed you.
deathforensics.title: Death Forensics — your last death:
deathforensics.nearby: %s hostile mob(s) were within 16 blocks at the time.
deathforensics.nearby.none: No hostile mobs were within 16 blocks.
deathforensics.none: No death recorded this session yet — come back after you die.
deathforensics.playeronly: No death to report (player not found or not online).
